original_image_tags: A rectangular ink stamp in the lower right quadrant of the page. The top text reads "FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION" with a line below it starting "U.S. DE" followed by a redacted section. The date "AUG 8 1947" is prominent in the center. Below the date, "SAN FRANCISCO" is visible, and below that, "QUOTED TO" followed by illegible text.

elements.description: A typed memorandum from Headquarters Fourth Air Force, dated 4 August 1947, regarding the 'Investigation of "Flying Discs"'. It includes a signature by William R. Graham, Major, Air Corps, and a stamp labeled 'FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION' with the date 'AUG 8 1947' and 'SAN FRANCISCO' below it.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence and key details of the FBI stamp, but Description B omits specific quoted text and the 'QUOTED TO' element described by A, creating a minor omission rather than a contradiction.
